# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for edge computing security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

// Allowlist of headers that clients are permitted to set
const ALLOWED_HEADERS = new Set([
  'content-type',
  'cache-control',
  'x-request-id',
  'x-correlation-id',
]);

// Allowlist of safe content types
const ALLOWED_CONTENT_TYPES = new Set([
  'text/plain',
  'text/html',
  'application/json',
  'text/event-stream',
  'application/octet-stream',
]);

// Maximum content size (1MB)
const MAX_CONTENT_SIZE = 1 * 1024 * 1024;

// Maximum chunk size for streaming (16KB)
const MAX_CHUNK_SIZE = 16 * 1024;

function sanitizeHeaderValue(value: string): string {
  // Remove any CRLF characters to prevent header injection
  return value.replace(/[\r\n\x00]/g, '');
}

function isAllowedContentType(contentType: string): boolean {
  // Extract the base content type (without parameters like charset)
  const baseType = contentType.split(';')[0].trim().toLowerCase();
  return ALLOWED_CONTENT_TYPES.has(baseType);
}

function validateAndSanitizeHeaders(
  userHeaders: Record<string, string>
): Record<string, string> {
  const sanitized: Record<string, string> = {};

  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(userHeaders)) {
    const lowerKey = key.toLowerCase();

    // Only allow headers from the allowlist
    if (!ALLOWED_HEADERS.has(lowerKey)) {
      continue;
    }

    // Validate content-type specifically
    if (lowerKey === 'content-type' && !isAllowedContentType(value)) {
      continue;
    }

    // Sanitize header values to prevent header injection
    if (typeof value === 'string') {
      sanitized[lowerKey] = sanitizeHeaderValue(value);
    }
  }

  return sanitized;
}

export default async function handler(req: NextRequest): Promise<Response> {
  // Only allow POST method
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed' }), {
      status: 405,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        Allow: 'POST',
      },
    });
  }

  // Check Content-Length before reading body
  const contentLength = req.headers.get('content-length');
  if (contentLength && parseInt(contentLength, 10) > MAX_CONTENT_SIZE) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Payload too large' }), {
      status: 413,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  let body: { content?: string; headers?: Record<string, string> };

  try {
    const rawBody = await req.text();

    // Enforce size limit on actual body
    if (rawBody.length > MAX_CONTENT_SIZE) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Payload too large' }), {
        status: 413,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      });
    }

    body = JSON.parse(rawBody);
  } catch {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  // Validate that body is an object and not an array or primitive
  if (typeof body !== 'object' || body === null || Array.isArray(body)) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }),
      {
        status: 400,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  const { content, headers: userHeaders } = body;

  // Validate content
  if (content === undefined || content === null) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing required field: content' }),
      {
        status: 400,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  if (typeof content !== 'string') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Content must be a string' }),
      {
        status: 400,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  if (content.length > MAX_CONTENT_SIZE) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Content too large' }), {
      status: 413,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  // Validate and sanitize user-provided headers
  let sanitizedHeaders: Record<string, string> = {};
  if (userHeaders !== undefined) {
    if (
      typeof userHeaders !== 'object' ||
      userHeaders === null ||
      Array.isArray(userHeaders)
    ) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Headers must be a plain object' }),
        {
          status: 400,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
    }

    // Ensure all header values are strings
    for (const [, value] of Object.entries(userHeaders)) {
      if (typeof value !== 'string') {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({ error: 'All header values must be strings' }),
          {
            status: 400,
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          }
        );
      }
    }

    sanitizedHeaders = validateAndSanitizeHeaders(userHeaders);
  }

  // Create a ReadableStream that streams the content in chunks
  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const encodedContent = encoder.encode(content);

  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    start(controller) {
      let offset = 0;

      function pushChunk() {
        if (offset >= encodedContent.length) {
          controller.close();
          return;
        }

        const end = Math.min(offset + MAX_CHUNK_SIZE, encodedContent.length);
        const chunk = encodedContent.slice(offset, end);
        controller.enqueue(chunk);
        offset = end;

        // Use setTimeout to yield control and enable true streaming
        if (offset < encodedContent.length) {
          setTimeout(pushChunk, 0);
        } else {
          controller.close();
        }
      }

      pushChunk();
    },
  });

  // Build secure response headers
  const responseHeaders = new Headers({
    // Default secure headers
    'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
    'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
    'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
    'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
    'Content-Security-Policy': "default-src 'none'",
    'Referrer-Policy': 'no-referrer',
  });

  // Apply sanitized user headers (only allowed ones)
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(sanitizedHeaders)) {
    // Never allow overriding security headers
    const securityHeaders = new Set([
      'x-content-type-options',
      'x-frame-options',
      'content-security-policy',
      'referrer-policy',
    ]);

    if (!securityHeaders.has(key.toLowerCase())) {
      responseHeaders.set(key, value);
    }
  }

  return new Response(stream, {
    status: 200,
    headers: responseHeaders,
  });
}
